title: Scaffold Next.js TypeScript workspace
acceptance_criteria: Next.js 14+ app router created in frontend/ with TypeScript, Tailwind, Flowbite, ESLint, and testing config passing npm scripts
Environment handling exposes NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE with documented .env.local.example
Base layout defines Inter font, CoffeeOracle theme tokens, metadata, and shell components
`npm run dev`, `npm run build`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run test` succeed
